name: Excessive Inbound Denied Connections (SIEM Correlation Needed)
description: Detects an excessive number of inbound network connection attempts explicitly denied or blocked by a firewall or IDS/IPS, originating from the same source IP and targeting the same internal destination IP within a short timeframe. This is a strong indicator of active malicious reconnaissance, port scanning, or brute-force attacks.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of one of the denied connection events (e.g., the most recent one).

parameters.name: SourceIp
parameters.description: The source IP address attempting the connection (external).

parameters.name: DestinationIp
parameters.description: The destination IP address being targeted (internal).

parameters.name: DestinationPort
parameters.description: The destination port being targeted in one of the connections, if available.

parameters.name: Protocol
parameters.description: The network protocol used (e.g., TCP, UDP), if available.

parameters.name: Action
parameters.description: The action taken by the firewall/IDS (expected 'denied', 'blocked', 'drop', 'reject').

parameters.name: Application
parameters.description: The application protocol identified, if available.

parameters.name: RuleId
parameters.description: The ID of the specific firewall rule that denied the connection, if available.

parameters.name: DeviceName
parameters.description: The name of the firewall/IDS device reporting the event, if available.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The name of the Sigma rule that triggered the event, if applicable.

parameters.name: SIEM_COUNT_OF_EVENTS
parameters.description: The aggregated count of denied connection events by the SIEM (e.g., 150).

parameters.name: SIEM_TIMEFRAME
parameters.description: The time window over which the events were counted (e.g., '5 minutes').

parameters.name: SIEM_FIRST_EVENT_TIMESTAMP
parameters.description: The timestamp of the first event in the correlated group.

parameters.name: SIEM_LAST_EVENT_TIMESTAMP
parameters.description: The timestamp of the last event in the correlated group.
